usable_for: pressure tap/plane method; component/cluster/section naming; pressure and velocity basis discipline
required_tamu_fields: pressure basis;velocity basis;tap locations;geometry;Re;recovery status;same-QOI UQ

usable_for: subtracting inlet/outlet straight-pipe corrections before element coefficient naming
not_usable_for: component K when upstream/downstream disturbances are intentionally retained
required_tamu_fields: attached-pipe lengths;straight/developing reference;inlet velocity basis;element domain

usable_for: warning that bend K can be Re-dependent
not_usable_for: TAMU corner coefficient because source is sharp 90-degree miter elbow at higher Re and geometry is unverified
required_tamu_fields: miter flag;Rc/D;Re inside range;velocity basis;roughness;recovery length

usable_for: close-coupled cluster warning and tare-friction subtraction concept
not_usable_for: direct coefficients for low-Re HITEC or circular TAMU corners
required_tamu_fields: cluster boundary;separation distance;configuration;straight tare friction;velocity basis

usable_for: resistance-network/pressure-drop framework and future area-change source audit
not_usable_for: current Kc/Ke values because exact equations/pages and TAMU geometry mapping are unresolved
required_tamu_fields: D_up;D_down;area ratio;half-angle;edge radius;length;velocity-head convention;pressure recovery sweep

usable_for: low-Re tee split dependence, reduced-static basis, and recirculation-map precedent
required_tamu_fields: tee topology;branch numbering;split ratio;reduced-static pressure basis;alpha;Re3;geometry mapping

usable_for: order-of-magnitude missing fitting-loss screening after fitting class is known
component inventory, pipe diameters, heater/cooling jacket dimensions, fitting source-gap driver
inventory_rows: facility-reported reducer;facility tee/corner;all rows needing part numbers

not_usable_for: universal exchange coefficient or scalar fitting K
required_tamu_fields: cell volume;exchange mass flux;residence time;pressure and energy residuals;held-out validation
